bead.title: Stage 3.1: DELETE React frontend entirely
bead.description: Destructive bead. Run `git rm -r cli/internal/server/frontend/`. Remove the //go:embed directive in cli/internal/server/embed.go (or replace with a placeholder that embeds an empty fs until the new SvelteKit build lands). Remove or stub the spaHandler in cli/internal/server/server.go. `go build ./...` must still compile. User explicitly approved this destructive delete — pre-release software, UI loaded once, no state lost. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #27.
bead.acceptance: (1) `find cli/internal/server/frontend -type f` returns nothing or fails. (2) `go build ./...` succeeds. (3) `go test ./...` passes (SPA handler tests will be updated in Stage 4). (4) `ddx server` still starts (serves 404 or empty for /). (5) `git log -p cli/internal/server/frontend/` shows the delete commit.
